name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined in classic black leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. This card holder features four card slots, showcasing design craftsmanship. Black leather, embossed fabric lining, Gucci logo, four card slots.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined in classic black leather. Model: 771157.
Dimensions: 7cm (L) x 10cm (W)
Color: Black/Original leather.
